scenarios.capability: Select the correct file type (plan/justification/scratch) for a given request
scenarios.reason: The agent can read a request description and classify it using the type selection guide without any runtime execution.

scenarios.capability: Produce a correctly formatted context file with valid frontmatter and specific slug
scenarios.reason: The agent can write a file with correct ISO 8601 date, formatted title, and specific slug without running the script.

scenarios.capability: Identify and correct anti-patterns in proposed context file usage
scenarios.reason: The agent can review a described usage and flag violations of the skill's anti-pattern rules.

scenarios.capability: Determine when a context file is NOT the right tool and explain the correct alternative
scenarios.reason: The agent can evaluate a request against the 'Do NOT use for' section and recommend the correct tool.

scenarios.capability: Apply the decision rule to choose between plan, justification, and scratch for ambiguous requests
scenarios.reason: The agent can apply the 'reference later / temporary / guides execution' decision rule to ambiguous user requests.
